## Related Issue

## Type of Change

- [ ] Docs / examples / dependencies update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Improvement (non-breaking change that improves an existing feature)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style: `uv run ruff format .` and `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md guide
- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lockfile validation + lint + type-check)
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for my changes
- [ ] I have updated the docs where relevant
